project_info.name: AYESHA'S PRIVATE UNIVERSE
project_info.description: A private, intimate, cinematic web application built for an anniversary. Fuses luxury fashion editorial, Apple-style scroll, tactile archive, and a hidden emotional universe.

theme_strategy.description: The app defaults to Archive Black to create a private, cinematic theater room feel. Romantic and Editorial sections selectively inverse to warm ivory to create emotional contrast.

pairing_rules.headings_editorial: Bodoni Moda, font-light to font-normal, tracking-tighter.
pairing_rules.intimate_notes: Caveat, text-2xl to text-4xl, slightly rotated.

items: Ayesha Portrait: col-span-12 md:col-span-4 row-span-3 (Tall, elegant)
Our Story: col-span-12 md:col-span-8 row-span-1 (Wide, cinematic)

our_story_scroll.structure: 100vh sections with sticky positioning. Images pin while text scrolls over them. High use of negative space.

why_i_love_you_editorial.structure: Left column sticky huge Bodoni headings. Right column floating paragraphs with Caveat annotations.

memory_vault.structure: Dense grid with monospace metadata. Looks like a forensic evidence board mixed with a polaroid album.

global_cursor.behavior: Custom cursor masking default. On desktop, generates a max 8-particle lavender (#B89CFF) trail. Particles fade and scale down over 600ms.

magnetic_buttons.behavior: Buttons subtly pull towards cursor (max 8px translation) on hover using spring physics.

scroll_animations.behavior: Momentum scrolling. Elements reveal via mask-image sweeps (up/down) rather than simple opacity fades.

hidden_scroll_system.behavior: Long press (3 seconds) on the September 17 memory triggers a circular SVG progress ring. Unlocks /ten-months.

mascot_design_brief.visuals: Sleek, minimalist vector shape. Deep purple (#8B5CF6) and soft pink (#F3A7C4). Subtle floating animation (translateY). Acts as a guide/easter egg throughout the UI.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle film grain overlay (opacity 3-5%) on dark sections to remove digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used for password gateway and floating navs: bg-archive_black/60, backdrop-blur-xl, border-white/10.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal drop shadows. Rely on 1px borders and inner glows for depth.

media_and_images.strategy: No generic stock couples. Use atmospheric, abstract mood imagery. All personal photos act as polished placeholder cards with asset IDs.
media_and_images.placeholder_design: Dark surface (#1C1C21), subtle border (#2A2A35), centered JetBrains Mono text (e.g., 'ASSET_ID: 1709-A'), aspect ratio maintained.

image_urls.description: Black shiny silk fabric, perfect for CASE 1709 hero or dark editorial backgrounds.
Rainy neon city streets. Use for 'Our Story' transition backgrounds.
Purple liquid/water texture. Great for romantic/soft sections.
Neon pink and purple light particles. Good for magical realism accents.

component_usage_rules.buttons: Pill-shaped or sharp rectangles. NO generic standard radius. Primary buttons use kuromi-purple or romantic-ivory depending on theme.
component_usage_rules.cards: Cardless or 1px border. Do not use heavy drop shadows. Internal padding p-6 or p-8.
component_usage_rules.forms: Minimalist inputs. 1px bottom border only, or heavy glassmorphism for password gateway.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text against dark backgrounds meets APCA standards.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, memory cards, gateway submit) MUST include a data-testid attribute for automated testing. Format: kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: DO NOT build a generic SaaS dashboard. This is a cinematic private app.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Apply custom cursor logic ONLY for desktop viewports.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Use native Framer Motion or GSAP for the cinematic scrolling sections.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Implement the hidden scroll trigger carefully with a touch/mouse down timer.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Do not center-align text globally. Use deliberate asymmetrical compositions.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glassmorphism (12-24px blur).
DO NOT apply universal transitions (e.g., transition: all) as it breaks transforms.
DO NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
NEVER use AI assistant emojis for icons. Use Radix/Phosphor icons.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
